description: Web-based tool that creates standardized CodeMeta metadata files for research software, enhancing software discoverability and supporting FAIR principles through structured software description and cataloging.
name: CodeMeta Generator

indicators.Fairness: measures Fairness by generating standardized CodeMeta metadata that ensures proper attribution, improves metadata completeness, and enhances discoverability and interoperability of research software.

useCases: Generate standardized codemeta.json files for research software repositories
Improve discoverability and interoperability of software across platforms
Ensure proper attribution of authors and contributors through structured metadata
Support FAIR principles by maintaining complete and up-to-date software metadata
